control_path.description: Path or URL to pre-computed control input.
control_path.title: Control Path

control_path.description: Path or URL to pre-computed control input.
control_path.title: Control Path

TransferOverrides.description: Transfer inference overrides for a single control hint (all optional).

control_path.description: Path or URL to pre-computed control input.
control_path.title: Control Path

TransferOverrides.title: TransferOverrides

prompt_upsampling.description: If True, replace the prompt with a dense JSON prompt.
prompt_upsampling.title: Prompt Upsampling

prompt_upsampler_max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens generated by the prompt upsampler.
prompt_upsampler_max_tokens.title: Prompt Upsampler Max Tokens

prompt_upsampler_top_p.description: Native prompt upsampler nucleus sampling probability.
prompt_upsampler_top_p.title: Prompt Upsampler Top P

prompt_upsampler_top_k.description: Native prompt upsampler top-k sampling limit.
prompt_upsampler_top_k.title: Prompt Upsampler Top K

prompt_upsampler_repetition_penalty.description: Native prompt upsampler CTRL/HF-style multiplicative repetition penalty (>0).
prompt_upsampler_repetition_penalty.title: Prompt Upsampler Repetition Penalty

prompt_upsampler_presence_penalty.description: Native prompt upsampler OpenAI-style additive presence penalty (any sign).
prompt_upsampler_presence_penalty.title: Prompt Upsampler Presence Penalty

prompt_upsampler_seed.description: Optional integer seed for the native prompt upsampler's sampling RNG.
prompt_upsampler_seed.title: Prompt Upsampler Seed

prompt_upsampler_variant.description: Prompt upsampler variant. Defaults to the VFM model size for 8B/32B models.
prompt_upsampler_variant.title: Prompt Upsampler Variant

prompt_upsampler_endpoint_url.description: Advanced override for the OpenAI-compatible prompt upsampler endpoint URL.
prompt_upsampler_endpoint_url.title: Prompt Upsampler Endpoint Url

prompt_upsampling_applied.description: Internal idempotency marker set after prompt upsampling has already run.
prompt_upsampling_applied.title: Prompt Upsampling Applied

autoregressive.description: If True, use autoregressive per-frame generation.
autoregressive.title: Autoregressive

sigma_diffusion_forcing.description:
Post-shift sigma used to seed clean context frames into the KV cache under
diffusion_forcing AR inference. Overrides model.config.sigma_diffusion_forcing when set.
Ignored when causal_training_strategy != 'diffusion_forcing'.
sigma_diffusion_forcing.title: Sigma Diffusion Forcing

camera_trajectory.title: Camera Trajectory

wsm.description: World Scenario Map (hdmap_bbox) transfer control configuration.

num_video_frames_per_chunk.description: Number of video frames per autoregressive chunk.
num_video_frames_per_chunk.title: Num Video Frames Per Chunk

num_conditional_frames.description: Number of conditional frames from the previous chunk for autoregressive generation.
num_conditional_frames.title: Num Conditional Frames

max_frames.description: Maximum number of input frames to read.
max_frames.title: Max Frames

show_control_condition.description: If True, concatenate control video in the output.
show_control_condition.title: Show Control Condition

show_input.description: If True, concatenate input video in the output.
show_input.title: Show Input

num_first_chunk_conditional_frames.description:
Number of frames from vision_path to condition on in the first chunk.
0 = t2v (no conditioning), 1 = i2v, >1 = v2v.
num_first_chunk_conditional_frames.title: Num First Chunk Conditional Frames

share_vision_temporal_positions.description:
If True, all vision items in a transfer sample share one temporal mRoPE grid
(controlnet-style: control frame k and target frame k get the same temporal id).
Must match the regime the checkpoint was trained under — checkpoints trained with
the temporal-id-fix require True, ablation `*_no_temporal_share_*` checkpoints
require False. Defaults to True via `_TRANSFER_SAMPLE_DEFAULTS`.
share_vision_temporal_positions.title: Share Vision Temporal Positions

action_path.description: Path to action JSON file. Required for forward_dynamics mode.
action_path.title: Action Path

domain_name.description: Action domain name passed to get_domain_id().
domain_name.title: Domain Name

image_size.description: Target image height in pixels (aspect-ratio-preserving resize).
image_size.title: Image Size

action_chunk_size.description: Number of action steps to predict.
action_chunk_size.title: Action Chunk Size

raw_action_dim.description: Dimension of the raw action data. Required when action_path is not provided.
raw_action_dim.title: Raw Action Dim

enable_sound.description: Enable joint video+sound generation (t2vs mode). Requires a checkpoint with sound modules.
enable_sound.title: Enable Sound

vision_path.description: Path or URL to conditioning image/video.
vision_path.title: Vision Path

condition_frame_indexes_vision.description: Latent frame indices to condition on. Defaults to [0] for image, [0, 1] for video.
condition_frame_indexes_vision.title: Condition Frame Indexes Vision

condition_video_keep.description:
Whether to take the first or last ``max_frames`` of the conditioning
video when it is longer than needed. Defaults to ``"first"``. No effect
on image conditioning.
condition_video_keep.title: Condition Video Keep

resolution.description:
Vision resolution.

Defaults to model config resolution.
resolution.title: Resolution

aspect_ratio.description:
Vision aspect ratio. When None, image_edit preserves the input image's native
aspect ratio; all other modes default to 16:9.
aspect_ratio.title: Aspect Ratio

fps.description: Vision frames per second. Recommended range [10, 30]; quality may be degraded outside of this range.
fps.title: Fps

num_frames.description:
Number of vision frames.

Range by resolution: 256p: [24, 400], 480p: [24, 300], 720p/768p: [24, 200].
Image-only resolutions (e.g. 1080p) require num_frames=1.
num_frames.title: Num Frames

prompt_path.description: Path to a .txt file containing the prompt. Only one of 'prompt' or 'prompt_path' should be provided.
prompt_path.title: Prompt Path

prompt.description: Text prompt for generation. Only one of 'prompt' or 'prompt_path' should be provided.
prompt.title: Prompt

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt - describing what you don't want in the generated video.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

duration_template.description: Template string for appending duration/fps to prompt. Use {duration} and {fps} placeholders.
duration_template.title: Duration Template

resolution_template.description: Template string for appending resolution to prompt. Use {height} and {width} placeholders.
resolution_template.title: Resolution Template

inverse_duration_template.description: Inverse template for duration/fps metadata in the negative prompt.
inverse_duration_template.title: Inverse Duration Template

inverse_resolution_template.description: Inverse template for resolution metadata in the negative prompt.
inverse_resolution_template.title: Inverse Resolution Template

negative_prompt_keep_metadata.description: Compatibility flag. If True and mode is 'none', mode is promoted to 'same'.
negative_prompt_keep_metadata.title: Negative Prompt Keep Metadata

model_mode.description:
Generation modality. When omitted, the VFM modality is inferred from ``vision_path`` and
``num_frames``; action modes must be set explicitly.

num_steps.description: Number of steps for the diffusion model.
num_steps.title: Num Steps

guidance.description: Guidance scale for the diffusion model.
guidance.title: Guidance

guidance_interval.description: Guidance interval for the diffusion model.
guidance_interval.title: Guidance Interval

normalize_cfg.description: If True, normalize the CFG output.
normalize_cfg.title: Normalize Cfg

shift.description: Shift in the UniPC sampler. Ignored when sampler='edm'.
shift.title: Shift

sigma_max.description: Maximum sigma for the EDM sampler. Ignored when sampler='unipc'.
sigma_max.title: Sigma Max

num_outputs.description: Number of outputs to generate per sample.
num_outputs.title: Num Outputs

seed.description: Seed for the random number generator.
seed.title: Seed

defaults_file.description: Path to a JSON file of per-modality default sample fields. Overrides the built-in defaults.
defaults_file.title: Defaults File
